jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Razorpay
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
